checkpointing.strategy: After each authoritative completed week, export the live session state to disk via `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:export`, which now prefers `window.__JONES_FASTLANE_SESSION__` and falls back to `localStorage.jones_fastlane_save` only when no live bridge is present. If browser continuity fails, restore the latest checkpoint into the named session before replaying from onboarding.

latest_authoritative_state.checkpoint_summary: Persona A's named browser session reopened on onboarding despite the startup continuity artifact claiming `live_continuity`, so the slice recovered by importing the authoritative Week 7 checkpoint. From the restored Week 7 summary anchor at `₡286 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 40% / Sanity 35 / Trauma Reboot 312h`, the live Week 8 build returned direct manual control, did not reproduce the old one-choice opener, and still supported the deterministic `Sanitation-T3` plus `Work Shift x3` route under `TRAUMA_REBOOT`. The authoritative Week 8 summary closed at `₡458 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 60% / Sanity 25` with `TRAUMA_REBOOT (266h)`, and the exported checkpoint correctly reported `browser_state_source: live_session`.
latest_authoritative_state.next_slice: Resume Persona A from the authoritative Week 8 checkpoint or live summary state in `phase11-safe-grinder`, advance exactly one completed in-game week, start from the Week 8 summary anchor `₡458 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 60% / Sanity 25 / Trauma Reboot 266h`, and verify whether the restored `Sanitation-T3` plus `Work Shift x3` route still survives from the harsher hunger floor. Treat GitHub issues #7, #8, and #9 as fixed baseline behavior unless a fresh Week 9 run again shows a one-choice week opener after requirement filtering, `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:status` / `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:export` stop reporting `browser_state_source: live_session` while the live browser page is already authoritative, or visible onboarding is still misclassified as `live_continuity` instead of forcing checkpoint recovery.

start_state.checkpoint: Runner continuity claimed `live_continuity`, but the named browser session reopened on onboarding. The slice recovered by importing `docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/checkpoints/persona_a/week-07-save.json` into `phase11-safe-grinder` before gameplay.

high_signal_findings: `TRAUMA_REBOOT` does not remove the deterministic low-risk labor route by itself. Safe Grinder still recovers the full `Work Shift x3` line immediately in Week 8 once the week opens without the old forced event regression.
The live build did not reproduce GitHub issue `#7` during this slice. Advancing from the Week 7 summary led to direct Persona A control instead of another one-choice global opener.
The Week 8 closing summary reconciles cleanly again. The visible sanity rows total `-10`, `pendingTurnSummary.totals.sanityChange` also reports `-10`, and the live end state lands at `25` sanity.

Browser-session continuity remains runner-fragile even after checkpoint-helper hardening. The authoritative named session reopened on onboarding despite the startup artifact claiming `live_continuity`, but recovery from the Week 7 checkpoint import was immediate and lossless.
blockers_and_followups: **Checkpoint Recovery:** Startup continuity verification was a false positive for this slice. Preserve the Week 7 checkpoint as the recovery anchor until the runner/browser continuity layer stops reopening `phase11-safe-grinder` on onboarding.

**Checkpoint Export:** Authoritative Week 8 state exported to `docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/checkpoints/persona_a/week-08-save.json` with metadata at `docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/checkpoints/persona_a/week-08-meta.json`; the helper reported `browser_state_source: live_session`.

**Next Slice:** Resume from the authoritative Week 8 summary/checkpoint at `₡458 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 60% / Sanity 25 / Trauma Reboot 266h`, verify whether the same three-shift route survives the harsher hunger floor in Week 9, and keep watching for any renewed summary-accounting or continuity regressions.

action_constraints: Advance exactly one completed in-game week unless a blocker or unusually high-signal audit event stops the slice earlier.
Update run-state.json plus the relevant workflow markdown files in the same run.
Export a fresh checkpoint after every authoritative completed week.
Prefer compact state probes and selector recipes over broad DOM or file dumps.
